segments.text: Want to build the next generation of AI?
Google and Kaggle have teamed up to bring you a free 5-day [music] AI agents intensive course scheduled for November 10th to 14th. This is a nocost program designed to take you from [music]
foundational concepts to building truly intelligent autonomous systems. Forget traditional LLM applications. [music] In this course, you're going to master the
architectures, tools, and best practices that define the future. Over five intensive days, you'll learn the difference between agents and LLMs. How
agents [music] take real world actions using tools and the model context protocol. Advanced techniques for memory management and context engineering.
observability, logging and tracing for robust agents. How to move your prototype into production and deploy [music] multi- aent systems using the
agentto agent protocol. This is a rare chance to learn from Google's top AI researchers. [music]
Registration closes soon, so don't miss out. Click the link in the bio and secure your spot for the most [music]
